zh.lifeSummary: 當John Mitchell Esq於1360年出生在英國英格蘭素可爾斯特時，他的父親John Mitchell13歲，母親Clemency Gilbert21歲。他和Margaret Matham至少有2個女兒。他於1421年在英國英格蘭倫敦被列為commodore。他去世於1444年2月24日在英國英格蘭享年84歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭倫敦。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Mitchell Esq于1360年出生在英国英格兰素可爾斯特时，他的父亲John Mitchell13岁，母亲Clemency Gilbert21岁。他和Margaret Matham至少有2个女儿。他于1421年在英国英格兰倫敦被列为commodore。他去世于1444年2月24日在英国英格兰享年84岁，埋葬在英国英格兰倫敦。

nameMeanings.name: Mitchell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: from the vernacular pronunciation in Middle English and Older Scots of the personal name   Michael  . See   Michelson  .
English and Scottish: nickname for a big man, from Middle English michel, mechel, muchel ‘big’.
Irish (County Connacht): surname adopted as equivalent of   Mulvihill  .

variants.name: Michell
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Jacques, Etienne, Yvrose.
English (Cornwall): variant of   Mitchell   and   Michel  .
German: variant of   Michel  . This surname is rare in Germany.

variants.name: Mutch
meanings: Scottish (Aberdeenshire) and English (Lancashire and Cheshire): nickname for a large (tall or fat) person, from Middle English moche, muche ‘big’ (a shortened form of mochel, muchel). Compare Mitchell , Meikle , and Muckle .

variants.name: Meikle
meanings: Scottish: nickname from Middle Scots mekill, meikill ‘big’. Compare Mitchell 2, Muckle , and Mutch .

variants.name: Mickle
meanings: English (Northumberland): nickname from Middle English mikel, mekel, mukel ‘big’. Compare Mitchell , Meikle , and Mutch .
Americanized form of German   Mickel   1 or of a homonymous Germanized Sorbian surname (see   Mickel   2).

variants.name: Michael
meanings: English, German, Dutch, Jewish, and Greek: from the personal name Michael, ultimately from Hebrew Mika’el ‘Who is like God?’. This was borne by an archangel in the Bible, the protector of Israel (Daniel 10:13, 12:1; Rev. 12:7). In Christian tradition, Michael was regarded as the warrior archangel, conqueror of Satan, and the personal name was correspondingly popular throughout Europe, especially in knightly and military families. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed many cognates from other languages, e.g. Hungarian Mihály (see Mihaly ), Czech and Slovak Michal , Assyrian/Chaldean or Arabic Mikhael and Mikhail , and also patronymics and other derivatives from these names, e.g. Greek Papamichael , its cognate Papamichalis, and Michaelides , Serbian Mihajlović (see Mihajlovic ), and Slovenian Mihelčič (see Mihelcic ). Compare Mikeal .

variants.name: Mixell
meanings: Scottish and English: variant of   Mitchell  .

variants.name: Muckle
meanings: English (Northumberland): nickname for a big man, from Middle English mikel, mekel, mukel ‘big’ (Old English mycel). Compare Mitchell , Meikle and Mutch .
South German: from a diminutive of   Muck   ‘gnat’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When John Mitchell Esq was born in 1360, in Penhurst, Sussex, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Mitchell, was 13 and his mother, Clemency Gilbert, was 21. He had at least 2 daughters with Margaret Matham. In 1421, his occupation is listed as commodore in London, England, United Kingdom. He died on 24 February 1444, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 84, and was buried in London, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Mitchell Esq est né en 1360, à Penhurst, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Mitchell, avait 13 ans et sa mère, Clemency Gilbert, avait 21 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 filles avec Margaret Matham. En 1421, sa profession de son indiquée est commodore à Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé le 24 février 1444, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 84 ans, et a été enterré à Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Mitchell Esq 1360 in Penhurst, Sussex, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Mitchell 13 und seine Mutter Clemency Gilbert 21. Er hatte mit Margaret Matham mindestens 2 Töchter. 1421 ist sein Beruf als commodore in London, England, United Kingdom aufgeführt. Er starb am 24. Februar 1444 im Alter von 84 Jahren in England, United Kingdom und wurde in London, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Mitchell Esq è nato il nel 1360 nel Penhurst, Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John Mitchell, aveva 13 anni e il suo madre, Clemency Gilbert, aveva 21 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figlie con Margaret Matham. Nel 1421, la sua occupazione è indicata come commodore nel London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Morì il 24 febbraio 1444, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 84 anni, e fu sepolto a London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: John Mitchell Esqが1360年にイギリスイギリススセックスペンハルストで生まれた時，父John Mitchellは13歳，母Clemency Gilbertは21歳であった。彼はMargaret Mathamとの間に少なくとも2人の娘をもうけた。1421年，イギリスイギリスロンドンでの職業はcommodoreと記録されている。彼は1444年2月24日にイギリスイギリスで84歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスロンドンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Mitchell Esq(이)가 1360년 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 펜후르스트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Mitchell(은)는 13세였고, 그의 어머니 Clemency Gilbert(은)는 21세였다. 그는 Margaret Matham(와)과 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1421년, 그의 직업은 영국 잉글랜드 런던에서 commodore이었다. 그는 1444년 2월 24일 영국 잉글랜드에서 84세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 런던에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Mitchell Esq nasceu em 1360, em Penhurst, Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Mitchell, tinha 13 anos e sua mãe, Clemency Gilbert, tinha 21 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhas com Margaret Matham. Em 1421, sua profissão aparece como commodore em London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu em 24 de fevereiro de 1444, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 84 anos, e foi sepultado em London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Mitchell Esq родился в 1360 г. в местности пенурст, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Mitchell было 13 лет, а матери, которую звали Clemency Gilbert, 21. У него было по крайней мере 2 дочери от Margaret Matham. В 1421 году он работал по профессии commodore в местности Лондон, Англия, Великобритания. Он умер 24 февраля 1444 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 84 лет и был похоронен в местности Лондон, Англия, Великобритания.
